purpose: 50-scholar gold baseline per shared/scholar_authority/SPEC.md §10 line 460. Backs the calibration of compute_scholar_match_score 5-signal weighted-average + scholar_match_cell terminal routing per Phase 5 OPT-4 architecture (DEC-SRC-0013). Closes shared/scholar_authority/KNOWN_LIMITATIONS.md L-SCH-004. Each entry pairs an authoritative ScholarAuthorityRecord-shaped block with a calibration block that drives the per-scholar test scenarios.
